MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST, A CALIFORNIA BANKING CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules as follows: CROSS-DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST, A CALIFORNIA BANKING CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is off calendar at the request of the moving party (pursuant to e-mail dated 10/21/19).
